title: Credential Access Attempt Detection
description: Detects attempts to access credential stores including /etc/shadow reading, memory scraping and SSH key theft.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%/etc/shadow%' OR payload ILIKE '%/etc/gshadow%' OR (payload ILIKE '%Failed password%' AND payload ILIKE '%root%')) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
